title: Materialized Workspace Graph
description: Output of the graph engine. Written to _meta/graph-engine/output/graph.json after every full rebuild.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this graph was built.

broken_edge_count.description: Edges where the target file does not exist.

orphan_count.description: Nodes with no incoming or outgoing valid edges (excluding known leaf patterns).

id.description: File path relative to workspace root.

depth.description: Folder depth from workspace root (0 = root files, 1 = first-level folder files, etc.).

is_orphan.description: true if this node has no valid incoming or outgoing edges and is not a known leaf file.
